relationships.context: Block content must follow structure from registry definition
Block must have YAML frontmatter with metadata
Block must include feedback checkbox for usefulness tracking
Script validates generated blocks against quality checks
Manifest updated only after block passes validation
Pipeline system generates blocks from meeting content
